# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📋 Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test coverage improvement
- [ ] 🏗️ Build/CI changes

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested this change manually
- [ ] I have tested this change in the following environments:
  - [ ] Local development
  - [ ] Staging environment
  - [ ] Production environment (if applicable)

## 📊 ACTORS Components Affected
- [ ] 🌿 Environmental Metrics Server (Node.js)
- [ ] 💼 Derivatives Gateway (Go)
- [ ] 🤖 Agent Network (Python)

- [ ] 🎨 Frontend Dashboards (React/TypeScript)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure/CI/CD

## 🔍 Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## 🚀 Deployment Notes
- [ ] This change requires database migrations
- [ ] This change requires environment variable updates
- [ ] This change requires dependency updates
- [ ] This change requires documentation updates
- [ ] This change is backward compatible

## 📋 Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.

## 🏷️ Labels
Please add relevant labels:
- `component: [component-name]`
- `type: [bug/feature/docs/refactor]`
- `priority: [low/medium/high]`
- `language: [python/go/nodejs/rust/clojure]`
